## Type

## Checklist
- [ ] `cd frontend && npm run lint && npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] For new widgets: registered in `widgets/index.tsx`
- [ ] For NL patterns: ordering respects existing rules (mutations before read fallbacks)
- [ ] Screenshot / short GIF if the change is visual
